trigger_criteria.name: High Centrality, Low Trust
trigger_criteria.description: Member is nominated frequently but doesn't reciprocate

trigger_criteria.name: Role Discrepancy
trigger_criteria.description: Self-description differs significantly from how others describe them

trigger_criteria.name: Isolated Nominator
trigger_criteria.description: Member was nominated by many but didn't nominate anyone

trigger_criteria.name: Trust Asymmetry
trigger_criteria.description: A trusts B but B doesn't trust A (unilateral trust)

trigger_criteria.name: Missing Relationship Data
trigger_criteria.description: No relationship nominations from this member

trigger_criteria.name: Cluster Boundary
trigger_criteria.description: Member sits between clusters but no cross-cluster ties

sections.name: Role Clarification
questions: How would you describe your role in the group?
How has your role changed over time?
What do you wish people understood better about what you do?

sections.name: Relationship Depth
questions: Who do you go to when you need help?
Who would you trust with sensitive information?
Are there people you wish you knew better?

sections.name: Values and Vision
questions: What does this group care about most?
What should we be working toward?
When have you felt most aligned with the group?

sections.name: Group Dynamics
questions: How would you describe how decisions get made?
What's one thing you think could work better?
Who do you think holds the group together?

privacy_notice.for_interviews: All interview notes are confidential. Individual responses will not be shared with other members. Use pseudonyms in any reports unless explicitly permitted.

ai_fallback.reason: Privacy-safe mode: Raw interview data should not be processed by third-party AI without explicit consent.
